description: Health scan populates flag badges on memories with issues

evidence.response_summary: 4 stale flags returned for pumplai memories, 0 conflict flags

notes: Division by zero in scan_engine.py when age_threshold_days=0 — fixed in this phase. No conflict flags because list_memory_items() excludes embeddings from serialization (pre-existing gap).

description: Archive stale flag PUT succeeds, flag removed, toast appears

evidence.archived_content: [ARCHIVED 2026-02-25T10:59:00Z] Integrated Stripe payment gateway API for subscription billing.
evidence.rescan_note: Flag persists because staleness is based on created_at age, not content prefix. Archive is a content convention — flag removal requires delete or dashboard-side filtering.

notes: PUT succeeds and content is updated. Flag removal is a UX convention (dashboard could filter archived items). Toast is client-side behavior. Qualified pass: the API contract works correctly.

description: Conflict badge click opens ConflictPanel with side-by-side diff

evidence.root_cause: list_memory_items() does not include embeddings in serialized response
evidence.impact: _find_conflicts() requires item.embedding to be non-None for cosine_topk comparison

notes: ConflictPanel component exists and is imported by MemoryPanel.tsx. Cannot test end-to-end because no conflict flags are ever generated. Requires memU fix to include embeddings in list_memory_items() response or a separate /memories/embeddings endpoint.

description: Editing flagged memory triggers re-scan automatically

evidence.line_252: await runHealthScan(); // called after mutate() in handleEditMemory

notes: Code verified: runHealthScan() is called after successful edit. PUT API returns 200. Auto-rescan was added in 52-01.

description: Threshold adjustment in settings page persists across refresh

evidence.mechanism: Lazy initializer reads localStorage on mount, handleSettingsUpdate writes on Apply

notes: Code verified: localStorage persistence implemented correctly with read-on-mount and write-on-update pattern. Added in 52-01.
Page renders HTTP 200. API returns valid JSON with empty suggestions array (expected — suggest.py found no clusters above threshold).

description: Accepting a suggestion appends to soul-override.md and re-renders SOUL

evidence.diff_text_applied:
## BEHAVIORAL PROTOCOLS
- **Authentication Awareness:** Review task context for authentication-related edge cases before committing output.

notes: Accept endpoint works end-to-end. soul-override.md was updated. Suggestion marked as accepted. soul_renderer.py re-render invoked. Test suggestions were manually seeded because suggest.py's MIN_CLUSTER_SIZE/MAX_CLUSTER_FRACTION filters produced 0 suggestions from the small test dataset.

description: Sidebar badge shows correct pending suggestion count

evidence.badge_rendering: line 144-146: Conditional badge with pendingCount > 0, caps at '9+'

notes: Code verified: Sidebar fetches suggestions API, filters by pending status, renders badge. After T7 accept, 1 pending suggestion remains (sug-test02), matching API count.

description: POST /api/suggestions invokes suggest.py and returns results

evidence.initial_failure: suggest.py exited with error: memu_api_url not configured
evidence.fix_applied: Added memu_api_url to root openclaw.json (was only in config/openclaw.json)

notes: First invocation failed because root openclaw.json had empty memory section. Fixed by copying memu_api_url. Second invocation succeeded with 200. Empty suggestions array is expected (auth failure cluster spans >50% of activity memories, filtered by MAX_CLUSTER_FRACTION).

fixes_applied: scan_engine.py: guard age_threshold_days=0 division by zero
root openclaw.json: added memory.memu_api_url (was missing, only in config/openclaw.json)

blocked_tests.reason: list_memory_items() excludes embeddings — conflict detection cannot function without them
blocked_tests.future_fix: memU needs to expose embeddings in list response or provide a dedicated /memories/embeddings endpoint

data_seeding: 4 memories seeded via direct Postgres insert (from 52-01)
2 test suggestions seeded to soul-suggestions.json for T7/T8 testing (suggest.py threshold too high for 4-memory dataset)
